commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: I do not understand why the Lord said, "If you want to enter into eternal life, keep the commandments,(Mt 19:17)" and then mentioned the commandments relating to good behavior, if one is able to enter into eternal life without observing them. (On Faith and Works 15.25)

commentaries.author: Hilary of Arles
commentaries.content: Works give life to faith, faith gives life to the soul, and the soul gives life to the body.

commentaries.author: Leo of Rome
commentaries.content: While faith provides the basis for works, the strength of faith comes out only in works.

commentaries.author: Symeon the New Theologian
commentaries.content: If we are ashamed to imitate Christ's sufferings, which he endured for us, and to suffer as he suffered, it is obvious that we shall not become partakers with him in his glory. If that is true of us, we are believers in words only and not in deeds.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
